div.p:
We are pleased to inform you that your test report for Sale Order No. {{ object.name }} is now available. Please use the link below to access the complete Test report. You may download or print it directly from the system:
Report No. {{ object.name }} - {{ object.report_link_main }}
For authentication, this report is hosted live on our system. Kindly scan the QR code to view and verify the original document.
Thank you for choosing our services. We value your business and look forward to serving you again.

This is a system-generated email. For any assistance regarding this report, please contact your Customer Service representative (in CC). For all other inquiries, you may reach us at marketing@ttilabs.net or info@ttilabs.net.
We are pleased to inform you that your test report for Sale Order No. {{ object.name }} is now available. Please find the PDF Test report attached for your reference.
For verification purposes, this report is live on our system. Kindly scan the QR code on the report to view and authenticate the original document.
Thank you for choosing our services. We value your business and look forward to serving you again.

This is a system-generated email. For any assistance regarding this report, please contact your Customer Service representative (in CC). For all other inquiries, you may reach us at marketing@ttilabs.net or info@ttilabs.net.
